testcase.name: Creation_Of_Material

failure.message: The following asserts failed: Created Toaster message mismatch for: Material created succesfully expected [Material created successfully] but found [Material created succesfully]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: The following asserts failed: Created Toaster message mismatch for: Material created succesfully expected [Material created successfully] but found [Material created succesfully] at utilities.SoftAssertionUtil.assertAll(SoftAssertionUtil.java:59) at testCasesForOQProjects.Material_TC.Creation_Of_Material(Material_TC.java:114) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) ... Removed 27 stack frames

testcase.name: materialUpdate
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: By.xpath: //p-autocomplete[@formcontrolname='supplierName']//li[normalize-space()='OQ Supplier6'] (tried for 10 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.32.0', revision: 'd17c8aa950' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.10' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 146.0.7680.178, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 146.0.7680.165 (4b989da09e1..., userDataDir: C:\Users\HP\AppData\Local\T...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:58829}, goog:processID: 14176, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:58829/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 146.0.7680.178, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 1ad97163ab5987b5a444cae3f7c6b188 at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.WebDriverWait.timeoutException(WebDriverWait.java:84) at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.FluentWait.until(FluentWait.java:228) at pageObjects.Material.selSupplier(Material.java:258) at testCasesForOQProjects.Material_TC.materialUpdate(Material_TC.java:166) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) ...
